data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of reassignment if needed, but the evidence does not confirm that the system can reassign appointments based on optimization criteria. While the linked use case describes a booking process and mentions optimization, there is no concrete evidence or API read that demonstrates how reassignment occurs or under what conditions it is triggered. This leads to a clear gap in the validation of the requirement.
gaps: No evidence confirming that the system can reassign appointments based on optimization criteria.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
